race.comment: The Kris Lees-trained BRITISH GEM (7) is back after a four-month spell. Best effort last prep was a second at Doomben over 1350m when second-up from a spell. Will be too good for these if she finds that form. DAME DIVIDEND (10) settled towards the tail then found the line well to be beaten under two lengths over 1350m at Wyong last time out. Promising signs that day and in this weaker maiden she comes right into calculations. HARRY'S BOY (4) looked to have his chance but may have found 1200m a bit slick on debut recently at this track. Worth another chance over an extra 100m today. CZECH HER OUT (9) raced very deep at Port Macquarie last start so that poor result might be worth overlooking. In contention with the help of the inside alley. ANY QUESTIONS (2) made nice progress last time out and cannot be taken lightly, particularly with a soft lead likely.
